description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with single button cuffs and mid-sleeve tab, a spread collar, yoke on the chest with lace and pin tucks on the front, buttoned placket, box pleat at the back and a curved hemFitBlouse fitWash careMachine wash with similar colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeUse warm iron if requiredarrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt from arrow, with its crisp white look is designed with an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt, closed toe pumps and a scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
